title: patternbetter
description:
This is an add-on mod for AE2 Extended, which adds a lot of new- features for pattern
provider
body:
# Introduce
This is an addon for AE2 (Applied Energistics 2) and ExtendedAE, introducing new features to the ME Pattern Provider and Extended ME Pattern Provider:
# ✨ New Features
New Features:

✅1. Customizable Pattern Slots: The number of storable patterns in the Extended ME Pattern Provider can now be configured, with UI adjustments for setups exceeding 36 slots.

✅2. Quick Multiplier Buttons: Both the ME Pattern Provider and Extended ME Pattern Provider now support ×2, ÷2, ×5, ÷5, ×10, ÷10 operations, allowing rapid pattern quantity adjustments.

✅3. Page Jump Box: Input a number to instantly jump to a specific page.

✅4. One-Click Upload: Instantly transfer all patterns from your inventory into the provider.

✅5.Pattern Editing Mode: Enables precise control to individually set multiplication parameters for specific patterns

✅6.Smart Balancing Button: Automatically calculates the maximum compatible multiplier across related patterns, achieving dynamic equilibrium for entire recipe chains

✅7. All features are configurable. If you don’t like one, you can turn it off (or switch to version 1.1 for the page-turning button).

# ⚙️ Configuration
how to change the number of pattern slots in the Extended ME Pattern Provider?

1.20.1: This mod adds a configuration screen for 1.20.1 (which might look a bit ugly). You can change the settings after launching the game, or open the config folder after starting the game, find the configuration file with the same name as the mod, and edit it with a text editor.

1.21.1: Supports in-game configuration or manual file editing.

⚠️ Remember to restart the game after changes!

# 🚨 Important Notes
⚠️ Warning: Placing too many patterns then using ME Packing Tape may cause data corruption!

🔧 Solution: Install the PacketFixer mod to fix this issue.

The page of the ExPaterrnProvide  is more than 909 , there will bew something wrong(about 32000 slots)

# 📢 Plans
💡 Got feature requests? Feel free to suggest!
